API Reference¶

Flask Application¶

app.create_app(test_config=None)[source]¶

Create and configure the Flask application.

app.get_analysis_results()[source]¶

Run all SQL queries and return formatted results for the webpage.

Data Loading¶

load_data.create_table(conn)[source]¶
load_data.create_table_if_not_exists(conn)[source]¶
load_data.get_database_url()[source]¶

Return the database URL from the environment, if available.

load_data.insert_data(conn, records)[source]¶

Scraper¶

scrape.append_data(new_records, filename=PosixPath('/Users/lyuan/PycharmProjects/PythonProject/jhu_software_concepts/module_2/applicant_data.json'))[source]¶

scrape.parse_comment_row(row)[source]¶

scrape.parse_detail_row(row)[source]¶
scrape.parse_main_row(row)[source]¶
scrape.parse_page(rows)[source]¶
scrape.save_data(records, filename=PosixPath('/Users/lyuan/PycharmProjects/PythonProject/jhu_software_concepts/module_2/applicant_data.json'))[source]¶
